title: pteris scandens
intro: Pteris scandens, also known as the climbing brake fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, characterized by its climbing habit and delicate fronds. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Pteris scandens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to create medicinal remedies for a variety of ailments.
